title: takflow jobspec — job-run resource description contract
description: Canonical, language-neutral description of a job's HPC run resources. takflow renders it into #ORVIX directives; orvix translates those to slurm/donau/local. Keys are snake_case here and hyphenated as #ORVIX directives (e.g. job_name -> #ORVIX job-name). This file is the single source of truth and is vendored by orvix.

ntasks.description: Total task count. slurm --ntasks (no donau equivalent).

cpus_per_task.description: CPUs per task. slurm --cpus-per-task / donau merges into -R.

queue.description: Queue/partition. slurm --partition / donau -q. (Canonical name is 'queue', not 'partition'.)

project.description: Project code. slurm --wckey / donau merges into -d.

application.description: Application name. slurm --comment / donau merges into -d.

exclusive.description: Exclusive node access. Bare flag (true) or a value.

job_type.description: Scheduler job type (e.g. donau 'cosched'). NOTE: distinct from takflow's high-level serial/parallel TaskResource.job_type, which is never emitted as this directive.

memory.description: Memory requirement. slurm --mem / donau merges into -R.

dependency.description: Job dependency expression. slurm --dependency (no donau equivalent).

requeue.description: Whether the scheduler may auto-requeue the job. When false, slurm emits --no-requeue; donau/local ignore. Added in v1 relative to the original orvix vocabulary.
